title: Image cleanup/slimming options when copying
body:
Facing a situation where a large set of apps(containers), where not developed with good practice on image layer control.
While I know there is other upstream tools, is there any intention of adding image layer reduction as part of skopeo.
Something like --squash

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Skopeo, and the underlying c/image library, does not really deal with the _contents_ of the layer tarballs.

That’s the domain of Buildah, and I guess a short shell script could be written to pull the image, and create a new squashed one, using Buildah and its `--squash` option (or `podman build --squash-all`).
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
